title: trifolium nerimaniae
intro: Trifolium nerimaniae, also known as the "woodland clover," is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Trifolium nerimaniae include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote tissue repair, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Trifolium nerimaniae can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with the dried flowers and leaves being used to make herbal preparations.
